scripts.prisma:validate:local: set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local&& node -r dotenv/config node_modules/prisma/build/index.js validate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate:local: set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local&& node -r dotenv/config node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push:local: set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local&& node -r dotenv/config node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push:local:preview: set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local&& node -r dotenv/config node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma --print
scripts.prisma:migrate:local: set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local&& node -r dotenv/config node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate dev --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
